isolation.guidance: Flow Validator Guidance: Mocked cargo validation

observed: test result: ok. 9 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out
test result: ok. 2 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out

assertions.title: Request IDs and Typed Errors Stay Consistent Across Parsed, Raw, and Streaming Paths
assertions.observed: The passing mocked contract test covers request-id propagation on a parsed Responses object, raw file bytes response, typed 429 API error, and streaming metadata/final response flow in one matrix.

assertions.title: Upload Results Can Feed Downstream APIs Without Manual Glue Code
assertions.observed: Both mocked chains passed: files -> vector store file_batches create_and_poll preserved the returned file id and honored openai-poll-after-ms, and uploads -> batches preserved the completed upload file id without manual transformation.

assertions.title: Streaming and Structured Outputs Converge on One Final Typed Result
assertions.observed: The mocked structured parse and structured streaming helper both produced the same typed Scorecard result from the same JSON payload shape, and the test passed under cargo.

assertions.title: Uploaded Files Flow Directly Into input_file and Retrieval Surfaces
assertions.observed: The mocked files.create -> responses.create chain passed and the test source asserts the downstream request serialized type=input_file with file_id=file_doc_123 from the upstream file object unchanged.

assertions.title: REST Client Configuration Carries Cleanly Into Realtime Bootstrap
assertions.observed: The mocked realtime coverage passed for both prepare_ws_target configuration propagation and the websocket-hop harness, with output showing the websocket bootstrap test succeeded and the source asserting REST headers, websocket auth/org/project propagation, and session.created event ordering.

assertions.title: Verified Webhook Fixtures Round-Trip From Producer Metadata to Consumer Handling
assertions.observed: The signed webhook fixture verification test passed and the source mapping shows preserved event type, event id, resource id, and typed routing for both response.completed and batch.completed fixtures.

summary: Validated the assigned mocked cargo publish-ready cross-surface assertions with isolated cargo output. Both targeted test binaries exited 0, and all 6 assigned assertions mapped to passing mocked contract tests with no blockers.
